parameters.query: SELECT * FROM diagnosis WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true LIMIT 1

UPDATE diagnosis SET is_current = false WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true;
INSERT INTO diagnosis (patient_id, primary_diagnosis_code, primary_diagnosis_name, diagnosis_description, comorbid_diagnoses, severity, diagnostic_impression, is_current)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, true)
RETURNING *
